name: Poisson-manifold probe + Weibull aging
description: Tests whether distance from the Ott-Antonsen/Poisson submanifold predicts, precedes, and (under intervention) causes collapse of the two-population Sakaguchi-Kuramoto chimera (delta-omega=0), plus a Weibull/aging characterization of the campaign survival shape. Builds on the merged collapse-time campaign; reuses its shipped-identical integrator. Dynamics-only; no audio.

observable._M_note: Highest circular-moment order in D = sum_{m=2..M} |Z_m - Z_1^m|^2. M=4 captures the leading closure defects; on-manifold each squared term is O(1/N).

model._note: Identical to the merged campaign (campaign.config.json) so D-vs-lifetime is measured against the exact same dynamics and collapse criterion.

cp1_invariance._note: On-manifold chimera-like IC: both populations are Mobius pushes of a uniform grid (R = |a|). Evolve over several breath periods; D must stay at its O(1/N) floor (manifold is invariant under the sinusoidal mean-field coupling).

cp3._note: Per point, 30 campaign seeds chosen to span the lifetime distribution (quantile-stratified). Traces recorded until collapse + a short tail; event-aligned to test escape precedence.

cp4._note: Interventional seed families. Each family (fixed seed) holds the synchronized population at the canonical chimera envelope and a fixed incoherent pre-image set; we inject a controlled m=2&m=3 harmonic distortion of strength epsilon. Families are PAIRED across eps levels (same sync, same pre-image, same phi) so a paired baseline-vs-max test controls for family-to-family finite-N floor noise. eps is restricted to the MONOTONE band [0,0.5]: realized incoherent-D0 rises monotonically there (median ~0.18->0.36, spanning the upper CP2 range); beyond ~0.5 the distortion folds over and D0 DECREASES, so absolute-D0 bisection is not well-posed there. Injection can only push D0 UP from the finite-N floor (a finite sample cannot be more on-manifold than its sampling floor), so the tested band is [floor, ~2x floor] = the reachable CP2 range. Same collapse criterion and t_max as the campaign.

cp5._note: Censored Weibull/exponential/log-normal MLE per (N,A) with >=1000 nonparametric bootstrap resamples (seeded). Model comparison by AIC.
